name: codex-danger-gate
description: Require explicit human confirmation before supported high-risk Codex tool calls run.

interface.shortDescription: Human confirmation for high-risk Agent actions.
interface.longDescription: Shows an independent Windows confirmation dialog before supported destructive shell commands, file deletions, force pushes, infrastructure destruction, and destructive MCP tool calls. Denial, timeout, and internal errors fail closed.
defaultPrompt: Explain which high-risk actions Codex Danger Gate blocks.
Help me test Codex Danger Gate without changing any files.
